name: StabiliFPS
description: Sodium's best companion. Sodium (and other perf mods) raise your ceiling — StabiliFPS raises your floor and keeps the high FPS stable. Pure frame-time stability (1% lows, variance, hitch attribution) with zero compromise to gameplay. Chunk pacer, GC-aware deferral, raise-only RD governor. Works alongside Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, EntityCulling, etc. Every feature toggleable. Zero-config safe sub-pack.
